_comment: Publish-floor gate configuration. BX-9-PUBLISH-FLOOR-GATE (AD-2026-05-14-SPRINT-3-BX-READER-IMPACT-BATCH). Config absence = gate fails closed.

overrides._doc: Per-monitor floor overrides. Must be explicit — absence fails closed at default 800. Each override requires a 'body_bytes_floor' (int, >=1) and a 'rationale' (str, mandatory).

_example.rationale: Short-form monitor with <=400 byte briefs by design
